arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim must change his approach with Manchester United strikers before it's too late
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wanted a new striker in January but the Man Utd head coach now has to instill confidence in the player he wants to back.

arts.ttl: Talks held: Arsenal, Man Utd & Liverpool indicate plan to bid for €60m star following contacts
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Liverpool are showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt wonderkid Hugo Larsson ahead of the summer. The highly-rated 20-year-old has shone in the Bundesliga, and a host of top European clubs are now emerging as suitors for him. Sources have indicated to CaughtOffside that interest from Arsenal, […] The post Talks held: Arsenal, Man Utd & Liverpool indicate plan to bid for €60m star following contacts appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford disagreement behind Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Amorim claimed last month he would rather use the club’s 63-year-old goalkeeping coach than Rashford

arts.ttl: 'A brutal reality for Man Utd' - McNulty's deadline day verdict
arts.sum: As the winter transfer window closes, BBC Sport's chief football writer Phil McNulty gives his verdict.

arts.ttl: Casemiro and five forgotten stars who could still LEAVE their clubs after January transfer window
arts.sum: Leagues such as the Super Lig in Turkey and the MLS in the United States are still able to sign players even with the window closed for teams in divisions such as the Premier League. You would be forgiven for having forgotten about Datro David Fofana but the striker was recalled by Chelsea in the dying moments of the January transfer window after an unsuccessful loan in Turkey at Goztepe.

arts.ttl: Manchester United might have second thoughts about Ruud van Nistelrooy decision in FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Man Utd play Leicester in the FA Cup on Friday night and here are five things to look out for in the clash.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Leicester in FA Cup fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd play Leicester City in the FA Cup on Friday night and here's how our writers think they should start.

arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy left Manchester United after Ruben Amorim appointment
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim opted against keeping Ruud van Nistelrooy as he was joined by six backroom staff members at Man United.

arts.ttl: 'Until then' - Ruben Amorim teases Chido Obi-Martin first-team prospects at Manchester United
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin is only 17 but, as a prolific Man United striker, he could force his way into the first team squad this season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim opens up on why he axed Ruud van Nistelrooy from coaching staff when he took Man United job ahead of reunion with Leicester boss
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists it was the right decision to leave Ruud van Nistelrooy out of his backroom team at Manchester United, but admits it hurts his pride to know the Dutchman has a better record than him.
